problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Combining Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
